topics.title: Phase 5 Progress Update
key_points: first UI panel added to Streamlit app
prompt quality uneven, some tasks return placeholder-like content
supporting_evidence: The structured outputs foundation has been implemented with task schemas, a registry, JSON parsing, and validation.
A first UI panel was added to the Streamlit app so users can run extraction, summary, checklist, and CV analysis.

payload.executive_summary: Phase 5 progress includes implementing a structured output foundation and adding a UI panel in the Streamlit app. However, prompt quality remains uneven with some tasks producing placeholder content.
key_insights: need to improve grounding, document-context usage, and output quality
next milestone is to add an automated evaluation harness and complete code-analysis mode

payload.title: Project Release Candidate Preparation Checklist
payload.description: A comprehensive checklist to ensure all necessary steps are completed before approving a new project release candidate.

items.title: Verify Changelog
items.description: Ensure the changelog is up-to-date and accurate for the current release candidate.

items.title: Run Automated Tests
items.description: Execute all automated tests to ensure the release candidate meets quality standards.

items.title: Update Environment Examples
items.description: Review and update any environment examples to reflect the latest changes in the release candidate.

items.title: Validate Streamlit Startup
items.description: Ensure the Streamlit application starts without errors and all components are functioning as expected.

items.title: Check Structured Output Tasks
items.description: Verify that all structured output tasks are correctly implemented and tested.

items.title: Tag Release in Git
items.description: Create and tag the release in git to mark this version as a candidate for deployment.

content.text: AI Engineer at Orion Labs (Jan 2024 to Present)

strengths: AI engineer focused on retrieval-augmented generation, document intelligence, and local LLM applications

payload.snippet_summary: The code snippet includes two functions: `normalize_scores` and `process`. The `normalize_scores` function adjusts scores to a range between 0 and 100, while the `process` function calculates the average score of processed items.
payload.main_purpose: To normalize scores within a specific range and calculate their average.

detected_issues.title: Duplicated logic
detected_issues.description: Similar logic appears in multiple places.
detected_issues.evidence: Repeated conditional branches in two methods.

refactor_plan: Step 1: Extract the score normalization logic into a separate helper function.
Step 2: Update `normalize_scores` and `process` to use this new helper.
test_suggestions: Add unit test for edge case X (malformed input)
